tagline: The Microsoft SQL Server ingestion connector in Lakeflow Connect is now generally available.
what_it_does: The Microsoft SQL Server ingestion connector in Lakeflow Connect is now generally available. Preview the source setup tasks ingestion from SQL Server into Databricks using Lakeflow Connect. change data capture Change tracking and change data capture (CDC) enable Databricks to track changes in the source tables.
why_it_matters: Databricks recommends using change tracking for any table that has a primary key to minimize the load on the source database.
key_takeaway: The Microsoft SQL Server ingestion connector in Lakeflow Connect is now generally available.
